message:
fix: resolve compilation and clippy errors across test targets

- Add RobotResponse::success() constructor to core crate (was only in
  binary crate, causing test compilation failure)
- Add #![cfg(feature = "frankensearch")] gate to proptest_search_bridge.rs
  (test uses frankensearch types unavailable in no-default-features build)
- Fix 6 clippy warnings in agent_config_templates.rs: unnecessary raw
  string hashes (r#"→r") and map_or(false,...)→is_some_and(...)
- Apply rustfmt to touched files

17,030 lib tests pass, clippy clean, all 289 test targets compile.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
